news.t: BRHY or PFF — Which BlackRock Dividend ETF Offers Over 8% Passive Income in 2026?
BlackRock Strengthens Active ETF Platform with Two ETFs

overview.description: The iShares High Yield Active ETF (BRHY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund seeks to maximize total return by actively managing a portfolio of high-yield corporate bonds with maturities of ten years or less. BRHY was launched on Jun 17, 2024 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: BRHY or PFF — Which BlackRock Dividend ETF Offers Over 8% Passive Income in 2026?
data.text: BlackRock High Yield ETF ($BRHY) and iShares Preferred & Income Securities ETF ($PFF) are two popular ETFs for investors looking to generate passive income in 2026. However, the two funds…

data.title: BlackRock Launches New High-Yield ETF (BRHY)
data.text: BlackRock launched a high-yield ETF under the ticker symbol “BRHY.” BlackRock's Steve Laipply discusses this ETF and the outlook for fixed income markets.
